description_long: This coupe car features a classic muscle car design with a long hood, short rear deck, and pronounced fender flares. The body is predominantly white with two bold black racing stripes running from the front to the rear, accentuating its sporty character. The front end is equipped with rectangular headlights and a wide grille, while the rear showcases a subtle spoiler and horizontal taillights. The car sits on five-spoke wheels, and the side profile reveals a two-door configuration with a sloping fastback roofline. The windows are tinted and the overall stance is low and aggressive, typical of performance-oriented coupes. The details suggest a late 1960s to early 1970s American muscle car inspiration.
description: A white, two-door muscle coupe with black racing stripes, aggressive stance, and fastback roofline. Features include five-spoke wheels, tinted windows, and classic styling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and dual black racing stripes running over the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door layout, sloping fastback roof, and five-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the subtle spoiler, horizontal taillights, and continuation of the black stripes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe's profile, window configuration, and wheel design.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
